title: sorbus tianschanica var. tianschanica
intro: Sorbus tianschanica var. tianschanica, also known as the Tianshan Rowan or Western Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sorbus tianschanica var. tianschanica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
